Dear Peter,
With the Democratic primary just three weeks away, the FEC wants a final report of our fundraising numbers by this Wednesday, May 23. I'm so incredibly proud of our grassroots campaign, and I want this last report to show the unprecedented level of organizational strength we've built right here in VA's 7th District.
[**So let 's make it happen, Peter. Will you donate $25 or more today to help us reach our $15,000 goal by the May 23 deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HSuTq6SxdSVZZ_S7vljUalVHghCMp7kdrPHOmup5Y30=/QWg97SFKlBrUaVeU6qY7pTJqu40STkqZspM6EKX6geQ=?refcode=may21eoq)

And that's not all. We have a new TV ad up on air, and if we're going to win the primary, we'll need it to reach tens of thousands of voters. [Your $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/HSuTq6SxdSVZZ_S7vljUalVHghCMp7kdrPHOmup5Y30=/QWg97SFKlBrUaVeU6qY7pTJqu40STkqZspM6EKX6geQ=?refcode=may21eoq) will help us get the ad in front of 750 people one time. (Of course, the more you contribute, the more people you'll help us reach!)

After 11 months of campaigning, 98 meet and greets, and thousands of conversations throughout the 7th District, one thing has been made perfectly clear to me: **the people want a representative who is truly accountable to them.** They're tired of outside, special interest money dominating our elections and our legislators, and they're tired of the partisan gamesmanship. I want to put a stop to it once and for all.

Let's keep this new ad on the air and send a definitive message that ours is the campaign of, by, and for the people of the 7th. [Support Team Spanberger today](https://act.myngp.com/el/HSuTq6SxdSVZZ_S7vljUalVHghCMp7kdrPHOmup5Y30=/QWg97SFKlBrUaVeU6qY7pTJqu40STkqZspM6EKX6geQ=?refcode=may21eoq).

Thank you,

Abigail

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: The White House
subject: ‘Our enemies will take note: Gina is tough’
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098473b383df1b56d3bf87717ab2ddd5f9b8892e590db03352207294a6594cd859f61328e0ab31f50138a9372734f928980) The White House • May 22, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump hosts South Korean President Moon Jae-in at the White House to discuss recent developments in North Korea.
---|---
• | President Trump will speak tonight at the Susan B. Anthony List's 11th Campaign for Life Gala in Washington. [Watch live at 7:30 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e28409819b66b4780b30c7bb871fbe06551d83158f5b880ce424e97e1785be19c25315fbdaef712ab2caa1d864a554eb5a820eb)
## 'Our enemies will take note: Gina is tough'
**Gina Haspel was sworn in as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency yesterday.** A three-decade veteran of the Agency with seven field tours under her belt, Director Haspel was confirmed by a bipartisan vote of the Senate last week. Vice President Mike Pence administered the Oath of Office.
**"Our enemies will take note: Gina is tough** ," President Trump said yesterday. "Gina played a crucial role in our fight against al Qaeda. Her first day in the job at the CIA's Counterterrorism Center was September 11th, 2001. And she tirelessly hunted terrorists for the next three years."
**"You have placed enormous trust in CIA throughout your presidency** ," Director Haspel told President Trump. "And the men and women of CIA do not take that for granted." She added that "we must learn from the past, but we cannot dwell in the past. We must constantly learn, adjust, improve, and strive to be better."
[From Mother Teresa to counterterrorism, Gina Haspel's story](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098486983afd61f68f77f3f6260427af7a99c09f635f1e88a1211596463099a5148f445afe2e86211b94f614473bfd6245e)
**Watch** : [Gina Haspel's full swearing-in ceremony](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098fdd6d13084ec7e72853038d7ef6ec2285134fbdecb553f3076610ddd4697f0b5d6398df355c71575d6143340ebbfd755)

---
|

## Video of the day: NASCAR at the White House
**2017 NASCAR Cup Series Champion Martin Truex Jr.** joined President Trump at the White House yesterday. "The entire NASCAR field spent 2017 chasing 78," the President told Truex. "Congratulations again to these great, great champions, and to all of NASCAR on yet another incredible season." Truex presented President Trump with a special gift: an exact replica of his helmet.
[Watch President Trump congratulate NASCAR Champion Martin Truex Jr. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e28409850e96aae812dbbd6a8a9e69bf7e8fdc423cf8ac6395edecb6c537ac768bb6d1337458ad4cd249d7be2dfeeb0c1d7b00d)

---
|

## A sham vote in Venezuela
**"Venezuela's election was a sham-neither free nor fair** ," Vice President Pence said in a statement yesterday. "The illegitimate result of this fake process is a further blow to the proud democratic tradition of Venezuela. Every day, thousands of Venezuelans flee brutal oppression and grinding poverty--literally voting with their feet."
**The Trump Administration responded by upping its pressure on the Maduro regime**. An Executive Order signed yesterday by President Trump prevents Americans from purchasing Venezuelan debt, preventing corrupt officials in Caracas from enriching themselves at the expense of Venezuela's long-suffering people. President Trump's goal is the restoration of true democracy.
[Read Vice President Pence's statement about Venezuela's sham elections.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098b41e5acb463e4b78e5ce7cc5f043aa12a926f44768dda2d6c5b717f9682678c9b34fe0e34f723e14e974c3eda3e34a91)
**More** : [See the full text of President Trump's Executive Order.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098d3492c0c5f6b281a4b064761b1526bea9e21a3e5d52ba3d7f4349c8e80a6246a83d8712d7fa5986473298f4698ee60b3)
## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump welcomes 2017 NASCAR Cup Series Champion Martin Truex Jr. and his team to the White House** | May 21, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098f66113f6aa295eb0c0b122a84b5e7c6da8f3ac83dd41f1ce88f0d458890cc83514bdc58fe6b05608489194cffee5292d) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1dc4e15c5e284098dedebe79a29ff36b541ce0669d75ba889093ba363c5fd2dc9399f1f9476ef7f5f85b6feb951c5e06c2004eb8cec5ed92) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4124e4771463fc3ef243c79a90059e3b08becdf84fef95ec9962bc10147088e65ce4d91b9abe39253cb2bfccddfd571e8ef4739d383225bf9)

Every day, thousands of Venezuelans flee brutal oppression and grinding poverty--literally voting with their feet." The Trump Administration responded by upping its pressure on the Maduro regime. An Executive Order signed yesterday by President Trump prevents Americans from purchasing Venezuelan debt, preventing corrupt officials in Caracas from enriching themselves at the expense of Venezuela's long-suffering people. President Trump's goal is the restoration of true democracy. More : Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks President Donald J. Trump welcomes 2017 NASCAR Cup Series Champion Martin Truex Jr. and his team to the White House | May 21, 2018 | |

| | | Friends,

Today's the day. After nine months of knocking on doors, calling voters, driving to every corner of this district and listening to thousands of Arkansans, today we will see who the people of this district decide will be the Democratic nominee for the Second District. I'm confident that our people-powered campaign will shock the establishment and show the pundits that the people of Central Arkansas are ready for a Representative who will only ever speak for them, and who can never be bought by special interests or party bosses in D.C.

And if you're looking for a place to celebrate the end of the primary, please come down to our office for our Watch Party! There will be plenty of refreshments, and I can't think of anywhere I'd rather be than with all of you tonight.
---
| [ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY](https://paulspencer2018.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c286683455dc2d807b90e667d&id=837d840787&e=f1637b94bf "ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY")

body:
There is only one way to truly hold this president and his party accountable -- and it's by taking back Congress and electing Democrats to fight, block, and stymie Trump's agenda across the country.
---
Here's the truth: There is only one way to truly hold this president and his party accountable -- and it's by taking back Congress and electing Democrats to fight, block, and stymie Trump's agenda across the country. It's that simple.

**If you are ready to elect Democrats and end this chaos, now's a critical time to show it. Donate $3 and together we'll help Democrats win nationwide.**

** I want to be very clear here: Winning elections across the country this November is not going to happen unless we make it happen. Republicans aren't going to take their recent losses lying down -- in fact, I can personally tell you that they are hellbent on doing whatever it takes to keep their majorities in Congress and state legislatures.

You and I both know that Democrats need to win in November. Defeating the GOP won't be easy, but we can do it if we work together, starting right now.

Our candidates across the country are ramping up their campaigns and they're counting on our support -- early in the midterms when it counts the most. So I'm asking you directly:

**[If you're committed to electing Democrats and holding Donald Trump and this Republican-led Congress accountable, chip in $3 right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522fe1/4067b0a/59a7abd35/7e47eaf3/2579195469/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/end-the-chaos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+If+youre+committed+to+electing+Democrats&utm_campaign=em_20180522_tp_nd&source=em_20180522_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180522_tp_nd")**

Thanks for standing with Democrats.

Tom

name: Jason Yates
subject: Information regarding absentee voting in VA
body:
Peter,
The Primary in Virginia is June 12th and these days voting can be as easy as having an absentee ballot mailed to you. In Virginia, an individual is eligible to vote absentee in an election if he or she cannot make it to the polls on Election Day for one of the following reasons:
* The individual is a "student attending college or university outside of locality of residence in Virginia."
* The individual is a "spouse of student attending college or university outside locality of residence in Virginia."
* The individual has "business outside County/City of residence on election day."
* The individual has "personal business or vacation outside County/City of residence on election day."
* The individual is "working and commuting to/from home for 11 or more hours between 6:00 AM and 7:00 PM on election day."
* The individual is a "first responder (law enforcement, fire fighter, emergency technician, etc.)."
* The individual has a "disability or illness."
* The individual is "primarily and personally responsible for the care of a disabled/ill family member confined at home."
* The individual is pregnant.
* The individual is "confined, awaiting trial."
* The individual is "confined, convicted of misdemeanor."
* The individual is an "electoral board member, registrar, officer of election, or custodian of voting equipment."
* The individual has "a religious obligation."
* The individual is an "Active Duty Merchant Marine or Armed Forces."
* The individual is a "spouse or dependent living with" an Active Duty Merchant Marine or Armed Forces member.
* The individual is "temporarily residing outside U.S."
* The individual is "temporarily residing outside of U.S. for employment or spouse or dependent residing with employee."
* The individual is "requesting a ballot for presidential and vice-presidential electors only."
* The individual is an "authorized representative of candidate or party serving inside the polling place."

If you are planning to vote absentee, your absentee ballot application must be received by 5:00 p.m. the Tuesday before Election Day if requested by mail, or received 3 days before Election Day, if applying and casting absentee ballot in person. You can request an absentee ballot application through [Virginia's Department of Election website](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1805223wb4pe&n=1). Once you get and complete your absentee ballot, it must be received by 7:00 p.m. on Election Day.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1805223wb4pe&n=2)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1805223wb4pe&n=3).

Peter,

Did you hear about Iowa banning virtually all abortion?

Earlier this month, Republican Gov. Kim Reynolds signed into law the most restrictive abortion ban in the country.

This law would make virtually all abortions after six weeks illegal -- before many women even know they are pregnant.

Iowa is the perfect example of what happens when anti-choice Republicans completely control state governments: They launch extreme attacks on women's rights.

But the good news is we've endorsed six pro-choice Democratic women for state legislative seats in Iowa who are ready to fight back.

**[Donate $3 to help fill the Iowa state legislature-- and state legislatures across the country -- with pro-choice Democratic women who will fight Republican attacks on choice.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5bf5/24c69fd9/1bb35a6a7/188ee218/3132318953/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180522_email_IowaBan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+fill+the+Iowa+state+leg&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ53N_digital_email_20180522_IowaBan_inact&source=WQEFEQ53N_digital_email_20180522_IowaBan_inact")**

If they win, they'll flip seats held by anti-choice Republicans who _all_ voted for the abortion ban.

**Janice Weiner (SD-37)** is running to protect an open blue seat in the state Senate. And **Lindsay James (HD-99)** could fill the seat formerly held by our endorsed U.S. House candidate Abby Finkenauer in the state House.

All of them are key to turning Iowa blue again.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
In the coming weeks I will have more information to share. But today, I wanted to let you know that it was my intention to run...
#
Friends -
I have some important news to share, and I wanted you to hear it directly from me:
**Yesterday, as Vermont's senator, I announced my intention to run for re-election to the United States Senate in 2018.**
The truth is these are painful, frightening and unprecedented times.
We have seen a right-wing extremist, Republican Congress attempt to throw up to 32 million Americans off of the health care they have, give a trillion dollars in tax breaks to the richest people in our country and the largest corporations, destroy environmental legislation, work aggressively to deny women the right to control their own bodies and end net neutrality.
We have a president who is not only a pathological liar but someone who is trying to win votes by dividing our nation up based on the color of our skin, our country of origin, our religion, our gender or our sexual orientation. Further, and dangerously, he is undermining our democratic institutions as he attempts to move us toward an authoritarian type society.
If re-elected, you can be sure that I will continue to be the fiercest opponent in the Senate to the right-wing extremism of Trump and the Republican leadership.
But being anti-Trump and anti-Republican is not enough. We need to continue our fight for a progressive agenda which will take on oligarchy and improve the lives of working people throughout our country. We need to keep pushing for Medicare for all, a $15/hour living wage, free college tuition at public colleges and universities and the reduction of student debt, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, fighting climate change and promoting racial, social and environmental justice.
It is my intention to run a strong grassroots campaign throughout Vermont, and I look forward to your support. In the coming weeks, I will have additional information about when and where we're going to kick-off this campaign in Vermont and how you can help.
But today, I wanted to let you know that it was my intention to run again for the Senate and to ask if you could help us reach some modest fundraising goals we need to fund this grassroots campaign.
**[Please make a $3 donation to my re-election campaign today. We have some modest fundraising goals to hit in order to fund this effort, so your donation will go a long way toward ensuring we win in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180522-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180522-t1-full")**
The truth is, whether it is intensifying our fight against Trumpism or increasing our efforts to spread our progressive vision in every corner of the land, no one person can do that alone. We're in this together. The progress that we've been making over the last several years is because people from all communities and of all backgrounds have made their voices heard and are prepared to stand up and fight back.
That is the political revolution -- and it continues.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
******[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180522-t1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie_reelect?refcode=em180522-t1-full")******

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I spent a lot of time writing this email last night. In fact, I am a little nervous sending this to you. It’s important and I hope you’ll take the time to read the entire message. Here it goes... May continues to be the best month of the campaign. We have reached a _**Pivotal**_ moment and the winds are turning drastically in our favor. Elections are not won the week or two before votes are cast - elections are won MONTHS leading up to the election, and we are putting in the work NOW to build momentum. Those who have the momentum tend to cross the finish line. We have more volunteers, donors, and Name ID than ever before. We produce earned media and are reaching thousands of voters every day. This month, you and I won the Missouri U.S. Senate debate hands down. **Meanwhile, Josh Hawley’s campaign continues to fall apart**. He’s stated he’s in favor of gun control. He missed the debate. Politico wrote a scathing piece about how voters, GOP donors, and the media are frustrated with him and do not believe he is ready to face Claire McCaskill. **So what’s next?** I’ll be honest with you. [**I need you to make your first online donation to the campaign.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D052218_frnon%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=052218_frnon&n=1) I looked up your profile in our database and it looks like you haven’t made one yet? Friend, I need absolutely everyone onboard. I don’t care if you can donate $5 or $500. I am asking you to put some skin in the game. I have put my entire life on hold to run for Senate because I know how incredibly important it is that we fire Claire, and I am ready to serve. I know I can beat her. I’m putting in the work. I just need you to chip in, and I will make you and all of Missouri proud. It is not enough to be a conservative, libertarian, or simply be correct on the issues. We have to do something about it. We owe it to our philosophy and our principles to win. And victory is impossible without your help. name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg: "egregiously wrong"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I've spent my life using law to fight against corruption at the national and state level.
#
Peter,
Yesterday in a 5-4 decision, the Supreme Court handed down a big win for corporations that will drastically limit the rights of workers seeking justice.
Neil Gorsuch authored the majority opinion, ruling that companies can force employees to waive their rights to class-action suits in favor of arbitration. Put simply, this means tens of millions of private, non-union employees will be barred from taking collective action if their companies screw them over.
Under these arbitration agreements, a corporation can stiff its workers on wages and then force them to take their claims to arbitrators individually -- resulting in exorbitant legal bills that would likely cost more than the settlement.
In her dissent, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg called the opinion "egregiously wrong" and called on Congress to act and correct this mistake.
I agree completely with Justice Ginsburg here, but unfortunately, you know as well as I do that Republicans in Congress will never address this.
We cannot give up though. In this case, 17 state attorneys general signed onto an amicus brief supporting the workers' case. And these briefs can have a significant impact in influencing the justices' decisions, especially when more states sign on in agreement.
I think it's critical for the next New York Attorney General to work frequently with other state attorneys general to make sure that the people's voice is heard by our country's highest court.
**[Add your name if you agree that our next Attorney General must play an active role in advocating for the people of New York at the Supreme Court.](https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/m/4d780e31/6e822e2f/18c9cf48/4172185e/855301548/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA1MjItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://zephyr.bsd.net/page/s/scotus-decision-workers?source=em180522-full")**
While yesterday's decision was disappointing, it was not a surprise. Here's a line from the Washington Post op-ed I wrote before Gorsuch's confirmation:
**_In disputes between the employee and employer, he sides with the boss._**
I know this decision was a setback, but it was not defeat. We have seen victory at this Court before, and we will again. But it's going to require bold leadership from state AGs who will fight for the people every day.
That's the power we have in this year's election, to take collective action and elect new leaders who will fight back against the corporate powers controlling our democracy and economy.
I can't do it alone though. We have to be in this fight together and make our voices heard.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout

body:
This is a blow to working Americans.
#

Friend,
Wanted to let you know quickly about a Supreme Court decision that was handed down yesterday:
In the first of two expected rulings this term regarding workers and unions, they decided that companies may require that employees accept individual arbitration for wage and other workplace disputes instead of banding together for collective bargaining. In other words: Every employee is on their own.
I won't sugarcoat it -- this decision hurts. It specifically attacks unions and the hardworking Americans who depend on them. Ben's not happy about it either, as someone whose family depended on union jobs to lift themselves out of poverty and pay for their kids to go to college.
It's also why he's committed to protecting the rights of working people no matter what.
**[The Supreme Court's decision yesterday is exactly why we need to fight for progressive values here in Maryland, and it's why we need to elect Ben as governor. Share on Facebook if you agree.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a628/7ab0e2c4/7fb33134/349bbec0/3841953789/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/posts/10155768600444436")**
Thanks,
Travis
Travis Tazelaar
Campaign Manager
Ben Jealous for Governor

Dear friends,
Did you see what Chris Sununu's Republican Party did last weekend? During its annual convention, the state GOP embraced embraced marriage as only between "one man and one woman" in its platform, excluding all other families.
We can't let Republicans take us backward. We need Democrats to win in 2018, and that starts with the governorship in Concord. **[Can you help our campaign by making a $5 contribution?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc482a/d0ce7de/516c6ff8/9cd1039/2081450438/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Did Chris Sununu reject this extreme platform and stand up for all families? No, in fact, he tweeted about how great the convention was and how "fired up" his supporters were.
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc482a/d0ce7de/516c6ff8/9cd1039/2081450438/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Nearly a decade ago, I helped make New Hampshire one of the first states to pass marriage equality. I've always championed equal rights, and I played a key role in the New Hampshire Senate passing a state constitutional amendment in 2014 to ban discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation. As governor, I'll continue to build a New Hampshire that includes _everyone_.
Join me in rejecting discrimination and standing up for all of our families by supporting my campaign for governor of New Hampshire. **[Can you donate $5 or more today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc482a/d0ce7de/516c6ff8/9cd1039/2081450438/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you.
Molly

We can't let Republicans take us backward. We need Democrats to win in 2018, and that starts with the governorship in Concord. "" Did Chris Sununu reject this extreme platform and stand up for all families? No, in fact, he tweeted about how great the convention was and how "fired up" his supporters were. "" Nearly a decade ago, I helped make New Hampshire one of the first states to pass marriage equality. I've always championed equal rights, and I played a key role in the New Hampshire Senate passing a state constitutional amendment in 2014 to ban discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation. As governor, I'll continue to build a New Hampshire that includes everyone. Join me in rejecting discrimination and standing up for all of our families by supporting my campaign for governor of New Hampshire. "" Thank you. Molly

body:

Peter --
We always knew that partisans in Washington weren't going to be happy about Governor Bredesen's message of bringing people together of all backgrounds to get something done in Congress. But after seeing our momentum, they're now in a frenzy to pour out-of-state "dark money" into our race.
**One reporter even said,_" I would expect the Death Star to be moving into orbit over Nashville real soon."_**
With a threat like this, we can't afford to take our momentum for granted. This race will be decided by Tennesseans -- not out-of-state special interests. We have to keep up the work of reaching out to our neighbors and earning every vote. To do that, we need the resources that will be required to sustain the campaign into November.

_Anne Holton_
